label: Member base allow: bob reads docs via member role-permission in default scope
Admin wildcard-default: alice manages members in default scope (delegable, not an owner-only lever)
Admin wildcard-default baseline: alice writes docs in default scope (allowed where not narrowed)
Admin narrowed in org scope: the admin->app.docs:write deny override denies alice there
owner_only fence: system.recovery:manage is not grantable to a non-owner admin
Direct permission binding allow: bob writes docs in default scope via direct allow binding
Denied action: bob cannot manage members in default scope (member has no such grant, no wildcard)
